title: Josué Forte
text: Home * People * Josué Forte Josué Forte [1] Josué Forte , a Brazilian computer scientist, computer chess programmer and author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compatible chess engine Matheus , which already had its tournament debut at Don Beal's Uniform-Platform CCC 1994 [2] , and was first published as WinBoard engine in 2002 [3] .
